mechanism_narrative: With FEDFUNDS pinned near the zero lower bound, the discount rate applied to equity cash flows remains structurally compressed, providing a persistent tailwind to equity valuations independent of short-term macro noise, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns during near-zero FEDFUNDS periods are not significantly higher than the full-sample mean (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 8% following a sharp prior spike, markets price in an imminent labor-market bottoming and subsequent recovery, causing forward-looking equity prices to rally over the next quarter as investors anticipate improving payroll trends ahead of confirmed data.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 8.0% after a rise of more than 3pp within prior 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 8.1% reflecting a recent shock-driven spike
failure_condition: In triggered instances, 60-day forward returns are negative or not significantly different from zero (t-test p > 0.05), or the hit rate for positive returns falls below 55% across at least 3 historical episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous month-over-month increase in RSAFS (retail sales) and PAYEMS (payrolls) indicates a self-reinforcing demand-labor recovery loop where consumer spending and employment mutually reinforce, and this joint acceleration predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days more reliably than either series alone.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS MoM change > 0 AND PAYEMS MoM change > 0
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes produce forward 20d returns not statistically distinguishable from episodes where only one series rises (difference-in-means p > 0.05), or Rank IC of the joint signal is lower than the single-series RSAFS signal over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During a post-shock recovery regime, a month-over-month rebound in INDPRO signals resumption of industrial capacity utilization and supply-chain normalization, which is rapidly priced into equities within one trading week, producing positive short-horizon forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 96.82 following a sharp shock-driven contraction
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following INDPRO MoM increases are not significantly positive (p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window during recovery regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is at the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL shows subdued or declining inflation, the combination signals that the central bank has ample room to maintain accommodative policy without inflation-driven tightening risk, jointly reinforcing risk-asset appreciation over the next month more than either signal alone.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes show forward 20d returns statistically indistinguishable from unconditional baseline returns (p > 0.05), or the interaction signal underperforms the FEDFUNDS-only signal in Rank IC over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) function as a leading indicator of broader economic momentum because construction activity anticipates future consumption and employment; a sustained upward trend in HOUST predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter as the leading signal propagates through the real economy.
failure_condition: Rank IC between HOUST 3-month trend and forward 60d returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year window, or the sign of the relationship flips (negative correlation) in more than one 3-year subperiod.

mechanism_narrative: A large monthly decline in PAYEMS exceeding a severe threshold signals an acute labor-market shock that triggers risk-off equity repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following 20 trading days as investors reassess corporate earnings expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 133,300 thousand reflecting steep prior employment losses
failure_condition: Triggered episodes show positive or flat 20d forward returns in more than 50% of historical instances, or the mean forward return in triggered episodes is not significantly negative (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery regime, joint improvement in INDPRO (production) and RSAFS (consumption) indicates that both supply and demand sides of the economy are recovering in tandem, a broader and more durable signal than either alone, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes fail to outperform single-series INDPRO-only signal in Rank IC over any 3-year window, or 60d forward returns in joint-trigger episodes are not significantly positive (p > 0.05).
